events.title: Yogilates
events.description: Yogilates blends the movements and postures of yoga with the core-focused exercises of Pilates, incorporating strength, flexibility and relaxation techniques into one 45-minute class. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Meditation & Movement
events.description: Join us for a guided meditation paired with a physical practice to help us move our bodies into wellness including stretching, yoga, Pilates, and walking. Mindfulness is about being present and in the moment. No prior experience with mindfulness or meditation is required -- everyone is welcome, students, staff, and faculty! Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Cardio Dance
events.description: Cardio Dance is a high energy and fun fitness/dance class that blends exciting club music and world rhythms with easy-to-follow choreography. Come and join the fun and find your rhythmic groove! No dance experience required. All levels welcome.

events.title: Cycle Core
events.description: This class offers a fusion experience of traditional high intensity indoor cycling with implementation of core exercises to fire up your whole body! Get registered today to improve your cardiovascular and core endurance, and strength.

events.title: Women's Only Strength 101
events.description: Have you hit a plateau or feel like you’re not getting any stronger? Our expert trainers will guide you through the steps to achieve your strength goals with a dynamic and strength targeted workouts. We will use a variety of exercises and state of the art equipment in our Strength and Conditioning Center. Challenge yourself in a supportive and motivating environment and achieve your fitness goals with our invigorating strength class. No matter your fitness level, this is a perfect class to learn the proper technique, fine tune your strength training program, or take it to the next level as an experienced lifter.

events.title: Hatha Yoga (Low Sensory)
events.description: This gentle class begins with a guided meditation, introduces yoga postures to stretch and strengthen the body, and teaches relaxation practices to reduce stress and calm the mind. Taught in a supportive environment, this 45 minute class is ideal for beginners, but all levels are welcome. Yoga mats are provided. Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: Power Yoga
events.description: Power Yoga is a dynamic, strength‑based yoga class that blends flowing movement with breath to build total‑body strength, endurance, and mobility. This energizing practice moves at a steady pace through creative sequences inspired by traditional yoga postures, with an emphasis on core stability, balance, and functional strength. Expect to work up a sweat while improving flexibility, coordination, and mental focus. Options and modifications are offered to support different fitness levels, making this class accessible while still challenging. Class typically ends with a brief cool‑down and relaxation to restore balance and support recovery.

events.title: Muscle Building 101: Foundation
events.description: Ever felt intimidated by the weight room or unsure if your form is correct? This specialized program is designed for individuals looking to build a sustainable foundation in strength and muscle growth. Led by our expert, participants will focus on mastering compound movements (Squat, Bench, and Deadlift) while following a structured progression model. Whether your goal is to "tone up," build muscle, or just improve your daily life, we’ll show you exactly how to get there. The program includes: Start & End Progress Checks: Utilizing the InBody 270 for body composition analysis to see exactly how your body is changing (muscle gained vs. fat lost) Step-by-Step Coaching: Two weekly sessions focused on safety, proper technique, and gradual progress. Hybrid Flexibility: Custom exercise sheets provided for supplemental training or missed sessions. Data-Driven Results: Track your strength gains and muscle mass improvements in a supportive, high-performance environment.

events.title: Soul Sweat
events.description: Soul Sweat is an energizing strength training class created for individuals in the Black, Afro, and Caribbean Communities. Open to all fitness levels, Soul Sweat fosters deeper connections within the community and promotes physical wellness, creating an environment where everyone can thrive together.

events.description: This program is open to all students, RAWC staff, faculty members and community members regardless of experience level. Running is not only a great way to boost your fitness, but it also has amazing mental and physical health benefits. Our group runs offer the perfect opportunity to meet new friends, explore campus, and crush your fitness goals—together!

events.title: H2O Bootcamp
events.description: a 40-minute fun and challenging low intensity fitness class designed for the pool using the resistance of the water. Get your strength and interval training with our aqua belts, weight and noodles. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout!! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Adaptive Drop-in Fitness Hour

No appointments required, just show up, and our trainer will help you move in the way that works best for you.

events.title: Low-Sensory Drop-in Hour
events.description: Low Sensory Drop‑In Hour is a dedicated workout time designed to provide a calm, serene, and sensory‑friendly environment for individuals who prefer reduced stimulation. During this hour, the SCC is adjusted to create a more comfortable and grounding atmosphere:Lights are dimmedSoft ambient music is playedOverall sensory input is minimizedWeights cannot be droppedThis space supports anyone who benefits from a quieter, gentler setting: whether due to sensory sensitivities, neurodiversity, anxiety, or simply a desire for a more peaceful workout experience.

events.title: Bootcamp
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity class that incorporates plyometric, strength, and interval training. Build your cardiovascular and muscular endurance using various types of exercise equipment and body weight exercises. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout, and finally relax and stretch! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Salsa and Bachata
events.description: Learn the basics of Salsa and Bachata, the most popular Latin club dances. This group class puts the focus on social interaction, teaching you to lead, follow, and develop a sense of musicality for a smooth dancing experience. Please bring clean smooth-soled shoes for dancing; partners are not required.

events.title: Pilates & Barre
events.description: This class incorporates exercises from different workout styles—including barre, yoga, strength training, cardio, and dance—to give a modern twist to Mat Pilates. You can expect an effective full-body workout every class and to have fun while you're doing it.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! This energizing, full-body workout moves you through a series of stations using a variety of specialized equipment including the Reformer, Chair, Arc Barrel, Mat, and small props like Pilates rings and toning balls. Each station targets different muscle groups, blending strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for a complete workout. The circuit format keeps things fresh and engaging, while the small group setting ensures personalized attention and proper form. Perfect for all levels, this class will leave you feeling strong, aligned, and revitalized! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility

events.title: Women's Only: Cardio HIIT
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity interval training class for all fitness levels. You will use a variety of cardiovascular and resistance training equipment such as Ski Ergs, Rowers, Curve Treadmills, weights and more to build cardiovascular and muscular endurance.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! events.title: Muscle Building 101: Foundation
events.description: Ever felt intimidated by the weight room or unsure if your form is correct? This specialized program is designed for individuals looking to build a sustainable foundation in strength and muscle growth. Led by our expert, participants will focus on mastering compound movements (Squat, Bench, and Deadlift) while following a structured progression model. Whether your goal is to "tone up," build muscle, or just improve your daily life, we’ll show you exactly how to get there. The program includes: Start & End Progress Checks: Utilizing the InBody 270 for body composition analysis to see exactly how your body is changing (muscle gained vs. fat lost) Step-by-Step Coaching: Two weekly sessions focused on safety, proper technique, and gradual progress. Hybrid Flexibility: Custom exercise sheets provided for supplemental training or missed sessions. Data-Driven Results: Track your strength gains and muscle mass improvements in a supportive, high-performance environment.

events.title: Yogilates
events.description: Yogilates blends the movements and postures of yoga with the core-focused exercises of Pilates, incorporating strength, flexibility and relaxation techniques into one 45-minute class. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Women's Only: Cardio HIIT
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity interval training class for all fitness levels. You will use a variety of cardiovascular and resistance training equipment such as Ski Ergs, Rowers, Curve Treadmills, weights and more to build cardiovascular and muscular endurance.

events.title: Meditation & Movement
events.description: Join us for a guided meditation paired with a physical practice to help us move our bodies into wellness including stretching, yoga, Pilates, and walking. Mindfulness is about being present and in the moment. No prior experience with mindfulness or meditation is required -- everyone is welcome, students, staff, and faculty! Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Boxing 101: Next Rounds
events.description: Ready to take your boxing to the next level? This program builds upon your foundational knowledge, intensifying both the physical and technical demands. This class is for those comfortable with basic punches and footwork who are eager to expand their repertoire. We'll delve into engaging offensive and defensive sequences, integrating slips, rolls, and everything we learned in Boxing 101: Fundamentals.What to Expect:Monday class - Practice combinations with a partner using focus mitts for proper technique and coordination.Friday class - Practice combinations and develop fight strategy by incorporating sparring drills with partner.Improve cardiovascular fitness, agility, and core strength.Make friends and build connections in a safe and fun environment.

events.title: Cardio Dance
events.description: Cardio Dance is a high energy and fun fitness/dance class that blends exciting club music and world rhythms with easy-to-follow choreography. Come and join the fun and find your rhythmic groove! No dance experience required. All levels welcome.

events.title: Soul Sweat
events.description: Soul Sweat is an energizing strength training class created for individuals in the Black, Afro, and Caribbean Communities. This empowering workout is tailored to the unique needs of Black, Afro, and Caribbean students, offering a safe and inclusive space to come together, work out with friends, and prioritize health and well-being. Participants will explore various ways to move their bodies, building strength, endurance, and resilience—all while having fun. Open to all fitness levels, Soul Sweat fosters deeper connections within the community and promotes physical wellness, creating an environment where everyone can thrive together.

events.title: Cycle Core
events.description: This class offers a fusion experience of traditional high intensity indoor cycling with implementation of core exercises to fire up your whole body! Get registered today to improve your cardiovascular and core endurance, and strength.

events.title: UTM Runs
events.description: This program is open to all students, RAWC staff, faculty members and community members regardless of experience level. Looking for a fun and social way to stay active while connecting with the UTM community? Running is not only a great way to boost your fitness, but it also has amazing mental and physical health benefits. Our group runs offer the perfect opportunity to meet new friends, explore campus, and crush your fitness goals—together!

events.title: H2O Bootcamp
events.description: a 40-minute fun and challenging low intensity fitness class designed for the pool using the resistance of the water. Get your strength and interval training with our aqua belts, weight and noodles. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout!! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Adaptive Drop-in Fitness Hour
events.description: A dedicated time supervised by a certified trainer designed to make fitness more accessible, inclusive, and empowering for individuals with disabilities or accessibility needs. During these open hours, participants can receive personalized guidance on:Machine and equipment setupExercise instruction and form checkingModifications and alternative movementsGeneral support for unique neededThis is an inclusive, welcoming space where every individual can feel supported, capable, and empowered in their fitness journey. No appointments required, just show up, and our trainer will help you move in the way that works best for you.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Women's Only Strength 101
events.description: Have you hit a plateau or feel like you’re not getting any stronger? Our expert trainers will guide you through the steps to achieve your strength goals with a dynamic and strength targeted workouts. We will use a variety of exercises and state of the art equipment in our Strength and Conditioning Center. Challenge yourself in a supportive and motivating environment and achieve your fitness goals with our invigorating strength class. No matter your fitness level, this is a perfect class to learn the proper technique, fine tune your strength training program, or take it to the next level as an experienced lifter.

events.title: Hatha Yoga (Low Sensory)
events.description: This gentle class begins with a guided meditation, introduces yoga postures to stretch and strengthen the body, and teaches relaxation practices to reduce stress and calm the mind. Taught in a supportive environment, this 45 minute class is ideal for beginners, but all levels are welcome. Yoga mats are provided. Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: HYRAWCS
events.description: Experience the global HYROX fitness phenomenon right here in our community with HYRAWCS. This progressive program blends endurance, strength, and technique while fostering teamwork, camaraderie, and mental resilience. Participants can challenge themselves or enjoy friendly competition in a supportive environment.What to Expect:Fun, energizing workoutsBlend of functional movements and enduranceStructured format and performance trackingPreparation for real HYROX racesA supportive community

events.title: Boxing 101: Fundamentals
events.description: This is an introductory program designed for participants who are new to boxing and want to build a strong foundation in technique, conditioning, and confidence. During this hour, the SCC is adjusted to create a more comfortable and grounding atmosphere:Lights are dimmedSoft ambient music is playedOverall sensory input is minimizedWeights cannot be droppedThis space supports anyone who benefits from a quieter, gentler setting: whether due to sensory sensitivities, neurodiversity, anxiety, or simply a desire for a more peaceful workout experience.

events.title: Bootcamp
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity class that incorporates plyometric, strength, and interval training. Build your cardiovascular and muscular endurance using various types of exercise equipment and body weight exercises. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout, and finally relax and stretch! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Salsa and Bachata
events.description: Learn the basics of Salsa and Bachata, the most popular Latin club dances. This group class puts the focus on social interaction, teaching you to lead, follow, and develop a sense of musicality for a smooth dancing experience. Please bring clean smooth-soled shoes for dancing; partners are not required.

events.title: Pilates & Barre
events.description: This class incorporates exercises from different workout styles—including barre, yoga, strength training, cardio, and dance—to give a modern twist to Mat Pilates. You can expect an effective full-body workout every class and to have fun while you're doing it.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! This energizing, full-body workout moves you through a series of stations using a variety of specialized equipment including the Reformer, Chair, Arc Barrel, Mat, and small props like Pilates rings and toning balls. Each station targets different muscle groups, blending strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for a complete workout. The circuit format keeps things fresh and engaging, while the small group setting ensures personalized attention and proper form. Perfect for all levels, this class will leave you feeling strong, aligned, and revitalized! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility

events.title: Women's Only: Cardio HIIT
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity interval training class for all fitness levels. You will use a variety of cardiovascular and resistance training equipment such as Ski Ergs, Rowers, Curve Treadmills, weights and more to build cardiovascular and muscular endurance.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Boxing 101: Next Rounds
events.description: Ready to take your boxing to the next level? This program builds upon your foundational knowledge, intensifying both the physical and technical demands. This class is for those comfortable with basic punches and footwork who are eager to expand their repertoire. We'll delve into engaging offensive and defensive sequences, integrating slips, rolls, and everything we learned in Boxing 101: Fundamentals.What to Expect:Monday class - Practice combinations with a partner using focus mitts for proper technique and coordination.Friday class - Practice combinations and develop fight strategy by incorporating sparring drills with partner.Improve cardiovascular fitness, agility, and core strength.Make friends and build connections in a safe and fun environment.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! This energizing, full-body workout moves you through a series of stations using a variety of specialized equipment including the Reformer, Chair, Arc Barrel, Mat, and small props like Pilates rings and toning balls. Each station targets different muscle groups, blending strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for a complete workout. The circuit format keeps things fresh and engaging, while the small group setting ensures personalized attention and proper form. Perfect for all levels, this class will leave you feeling strong, aligned, and revitalized! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility

events.title: Muscle Building 101: Foundation
events.description: Ever felt intimidated by the weight room or unsure if your form is correct? This specialized program is designed for individuals looking to build a sustainable foundation in strength and muscle growth. Led by our expert, participants will focus on mastering compound movements (Squat, Bench, and Deadlift) while following a structured progression model. Whether your goal is to "tone up," build muscle, or just improve your daily life, we’ll show you exactly how to get there. The program includes: Start & End Progress Checks: Utilizing the InBody 270 for body composition analysis to see exactly how your body is changing (muscle gained vs. fat lost) Step-by-Step Coaching: Two weekly sessions focused on safety, proper technique, and gradual progress. Hybrid Flexibility: Custom exercise sheets provided for supplemental training or missed sessions. Data-Driven Results: Track your strength gains and muscle mass improvements in a supportive, high-performance environment.

events.title: Yogilates
events.description: Yogilates blends the movements and postures of yoga with the core-focused exercises of Pilates, incorporating strength, flexibility and relaxation techniques into one 45-minute class. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Women's Only: Cardio HIIT
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity interval training class for all fitness levels. You will use a variety of cardiovascular and resistance training equipment such as Ski Ergs, Rowers, Curve Treadmills, weights and more to build cardiovascular and muscular endurance.

events.title: Meditation & Movement
events.description: Join us for a guided meditation paired with a physical practice to help us move our bodies into wellness including stretching, yoga, Pilates, and walking. Mindfulness is about being present and in the moment. No prior experience with mindfulness or meditation is required -- everyone is welcome, students, staff, and faculty! Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: Cardio Dance
events.description: Cardio Dance is a high energy and fun fitness/dance class that blends exciting club music and world rhythms with easy-to-follow choreography. Come and join the fun and find your rhythmic groove! No dance experience required. All levels welcome.

events.title: Soul Sweat
events.description: Soul Sweat is an energizing strength training class created for individuals in the Black, Afro, and Caribbean Communities. This empowering workout is tailored to the unique needs of Black, Afro, and Caribbean students, offering a safe and inclusive space to come together, work out with friends, and prioritize health and well-being. Participants will explore various ways to move their bodies, building strength, endurance, and resilience—all while having fun. Open to all fitness levels, Soul Sweat fosters deeper connections within the community and promotes physical wellness, creating an environment where everyone can thrive together.

events.title: Cycle Core
events.description: This class offers a fusion experience of traditional high intensity indoor cycling with implementation of core exercises to fire up your whole body! Get registered today to improve your cardiovascular and core endurance, and strength.

events.title: UTM Runs
events.description: This program is open to all students, RAWC staff, faculty members and community members regardless of experience level. Looking for a fun and social way to stay active while connecting with the UTM community? Running is not only a great way to boost your fitness, but it also has amazing mental and physical health benefits. Our group runs offer the perfect opportunity to meet new friends, explore campus, and crush your fitness goals—together!

events.title: H2O Bootcamp
events.description: a 40-minute fun and challenging low intensity fitness class designed for the pool using the resistance of the water. Get your strength and interval training with our aqua belts, weight and noodles. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout!! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Adaptive Drop-in Fitness Hour
events.description: A dedicated time supervised by a certified trainer designed to make fitness more accessible, inclusive, and empowering for individuals with disabilities or accessibility needs. During these open hours, participants can receive personalized guidance on:Machine and equipment setupExercise instruction and form checkingModifications and alternative movementsGeneral support for unique neededThis is an inclusive, welcoming space where every individual can feel supported, capable, and empowered in their fitness journey. No appointments required, just show up, and our trainer will help you move in the way that works best for you.

events.title: Women's Only Strength 101
events.description: Have you hit a plateau or feel like you’re not getting any stronger? Our expert trainers will guide you through the steps to achieve your strength goals with a dynamic and strength targeted workouts. We will use a variety of exercises and state of the art equipment in our Strength and Conditioning Center. Challenge yourself in a supportive and motivating environment and achieve your fitness goals with our invigorating strength class. No matter your fitness level, this is a perfect class to learn the proper technique, fine tune your strength training program, or take it to the next level as an experienced lifter.

events.title: Hatha Yoga (Low Sensory)
events.description: This gentle class begins with a guided meditation, introduces yoga postures to stretch and strengthen the body, and teaches relaxation practices to reduce stress and calm the mind. Taught in a supportive environment, this 45 minute class is ideal for beginners, but all levels are welcome. Yoga mats are provided. Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: HYRAWCS
events.description: Experience the global HYROX fitness phenomenon right here in our community with HYRAWCS. This progressive program blends endurance, strength, and technique while fostering teamwork, camaraderie, and mental resilience. Participants can challenge themselves or enjoy friendly competition in a supportive environment.What to Expect:Fun, energizing workoutsBlend of functional movements and enduranceStructured format and performance trackingPreparation for real HYROX racesA supportive community

events.title: Women's Only: TRX
events.description: This class will give you the opportunity to get fit using unique equipment such as TRX suspension systems, Equalizer bars, kettle bells and more. You’ll get a good sweat while learning new skills, building strength, and endurance. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Women's Only: Glutes, Core & More
events.description: A Pilates-inspired women's only fitness class that offers the benefits of Pilates training with an emphasis on the powerhouse muscles including the glutes and hips, abdominals, low back muscles and deep pelvic floor muscles. Join us and get the strength back in your glutes and core!

events.title: Low-Sensory Drop-in Hour
events.description: Low Sensory Drop‑In Hour is a dedicated workout time designed to provide a calm, serene, and sensory‑friendly environment for individuals who prefer reduced stimulation. During this hour, the SCC is adjusted to create a more comfortable and grounding atmosphere:Lights are dimmedSoft ambient music is playedOverall sensory input is minimizedWeights cannot be droppedThis space supports anyone who benefits from a quieter, gentler setting: whether due to sensory sensitivities, neurodiversity, anxiety, or simply a desire for a more peaceful workout experience.

events.title: Bootcamp
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity class that incorporates plyometric, strength, and interval training. Build your cardiovascular and muscular endurance using various types of exercise equipment and body weight exercises. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout, and finally relax and stretch! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Salsa and Bachata
events.description: Learn the basics of Salsa and Bachata, the most popular Latin club dances. This group class puts the focus on social interaction, teaching you to lead, follow, and develop a sense of musicality for a smooth dancing experience. Please bring clean smooth-soled shoes for dancing; partners are not required.

events.title: Pilates & Barre
events.description: This class incorporates exercises from different workout styles—including barre, yoga, strength training, cardio, and dance—to give a modern twist to Mat Pilates. You can expect an effective full-body workout every class and to have fun while you're doing it.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! This energizing, full-body workout moves you through a series of stations using a variety of specialized equipment including the Reformer, Chair, Arc Barrel, Mat, and small props like Pilates rings and toning balls. Each station targets different muscle groups, blending strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for a complete workout. The circuit format keeps things fresh and engaging, while the small group setting ensures personalized attention and proper form. Perfect for all levels, this class will leave you feeling strong, aligned, and revitalized! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility

events.title: Women's Only: Cardio HIIT
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity interval training class for all fitness levels. You will use a variety of cardiovascular and resistance training equipment such as Ski Ergs, Rowers, Curve Treadmills, weights and more to build cardiovascular and muscular endurance.

events.title: Boxing 101: Next Rounds
events.description: Ready to take your boxing to the next level? This program builds upon your foundational knowledge, intensifying both the physical and technical demands. events.title: Muscle Building 101: Foundation
events.description: Ever felt intimidated by the weight room or unsure if your form is correct? This specialized program is designed for individuals looking to build a sustainable foundation in strength and muscle growth. Led by our expert, participants will focus on mastering compound movements (Squat, Bench, and Deadlift) while following a structured progression model. Whether your goal is to "tone up," build muscle, or just improve your daily life, we’ll show you exactly how to get there. The program includes: Start & End Progress Checks: Utilizing the InBody 270 for body composition analysis to see exactly how your body is changing (muscle gained vs. fat lost) Step-by-Step Coaching: Two weekly sessions focused on safety, proper technique, and gradual progress. Hybrid Flexibility: Custom exercise sheets provided for supplemental training or missed sessions. Data-Driven Results: Track your strength gains and muscle mass improvements in a supportive, high-performance environment.

During these open hours, participants can receive personalized guidance on:Machine and equipment setupExercise instruction and form checkingModifications and alternative movementsGeneral support for unique neededThis is an inclusive, welcoming space where every individual can feel supported, capable, and empowered in their fitness journey. No appointments required, just show up, and our trainer will help you move in the way that works best for you.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Women's Only Strength 101
events.description: Have you hit a plateau or feel like you’re not getting any stronger? Our expert trainers will guide you through the steps to achieve your strength goals with a dynamic and strength targeted workouts. We will use a variety of exercises and state of the art equipment in our Strength and Conditioning Center. Challenge yourself in a supportive and motivating environment and achieve your fitness goals with our invigorating strength class. No matter your fitness level, this is a perfect class to learn the proper technique, fine tune your strength training program, or take it to the next level as an experienced lifter.

events.title: Hatha Yoga (Low Sensory)
events.description: This gentle class begins with a guided meditation, introduces yoga postures to stretch and strengthen the body, and teaches relaxation practices to reduce stress and calm the mind. Taught in a supportive environment, this 45 minute class is ideal for beginners, but all levels are welcome. Yoga mats are provided. Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

events.title: HYRAWCS
events.description: Experience the global HYROX fitness phenomenon right here in our community with HYRAWCS. This progressive program blends endurance, strength, and technique while fostering teamwork, camaraderie, and mental resilience. Participants can challenge themselves or enjoy friendly competition in a supportive environment.What to Expect:Fun, energizing workoutsBlend of functional movements and enduranceStructured format and performance trackingPreparation for real HYROX racesA supportive community

events.title: Muscle Building 101: Foundation
events.description: Ever felt intimidated by the weight room or unsure if your form is correct? This specialized program is designed for individuals looking to build a sustainable foundation in strength and muscle growth. Led by our expert, participants will focus on mastering compound movements (Squat, Bench, and Deadlift) while following a structured progression model. Whether your goal is to "tone up," build muscle, or just improve your daily life, we’ll show you exactly how to get there.

events.title: Cardio Dance
events.description: Cardio Dance is a high energy and fun fitness/dance class that blends exciting club music and world rhythms with easy-to-follow choreography. Come and join the fun and find your rhythmic groove! No dance experience required. All levels welcome.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Pilates
events.description: Achieve a balanced and toned body with the ultimate core fitness workout! Incorporate Pilate’s postures with traditional core exercises to help improve posture, strength, and range of motion. Rejuvenate your workout with a focus on your breathing and find those deep core muscles in the abdomen and that surround the spine. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! This energizing, full-body workout moves you through a series of stations using a variety of specialized equipment including the Reformer, Chair, Arc Barrel, Mat, and small props like Pilates rings and toning balls. Each station targets different muscle groups, blending strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for a complete workout. The circuit format keeps things fresh and engaging, while the small group setting ensures personalized attention and proper form. Perfect for all levels, this class will leave you feeling strong, aligned, and revitalized! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility

events.title: Beginner Boxing
events.description: Learn how to pack a punch in this technical workshop designed to teach beginners the basics of boxing. This session provides instructions on boxing stance, footwork, and fundamental mechanics of the jab, cross, hook and uppercut. Join this fun session to stay in shape and build your confidence!- This is a non-contact class*- Hand wraps, gloves and non-slip shoes are highly reccomended!

events.title: Cycle Core
events.description: This class offers a fusion experience of traditional high intensity indoor cycling with implementation of core exercises to fire up your whole body! Get registered today to improve your cardiovascular and core endurance, and strength.

events.title: Pride Pump
events.description: Pride Pump offers a unique fitness experience with guided support in an inclusive setting for the 2SLGBTQ+ community and allies. Join us for high-energy workout sessions that celebrate diversity and foster community. Tailored for 2SLGBTQ+ students, Pride Pump blends fitness with empowerment, encouraging everyone to embrace their identities while achieving their goals. Whether you're a fitness fan or just starting out, come energize your body and spirit with us!

events.title: UTM Runs
events.description: This program is open to all students, RAWC staff, faculty members and community members regardless of experience level. Looking for a fun and social way to stay active while connecting with the UTM community? Running is not only a great way to boost your fitness, but it also has amazing mental and physical health benefits. Our group runs offer the perfect opportunity to meet new friends, explore campus, and crush your fitness goals—together!

events.title: Women's Only: Glutes, Core & More
events.description: A Pilates-inspired women's only fitness class that offers the benefits of Pilates training with an emphasis on the powerhouse muscles including the glutes and hips, abdominals, low back muscles and deep pelvic floor muscles. Join us and get the strength back in your glutes and core!

events.title: Low-Sensory Drop-in Hour
events.description: Low Sensory Drop‑In Hour is a dedicated workout time designed to provide a calm, serene, and sensory‑friendly environment for individuals who prefer reduced stimulation. During this hour, the SCC is adjusted to create a more comfortable and grounding atmosphere:Lights are dimmedSoft ambient music is playedOverall sensory input is minimizedWeights cannot be droppedThis space supports anyone who benefits from a quieter, gentler setting: whether due to sensory sensitivities, neurodiversity, anxiety, or simply a desire for a more peaceful workout experience.

events.title: Bootcamp
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity class that incorporates plyometric, strength, and interval training. Build your cardiovascular and muscular endurance using various types of exercise equipment and body weight exercises. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout, and finally relax and stretch! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Salsa and Bachata
events.description: Learn the basics of Salsa and Bachata, the most popular Latin club dances. This group class puts the focus on social interaction, teaching you to lead, follow, and develop a sense of musicality for a smooth dancing experience. Please bring clean smooth-soled shoes for dancing; partners are not required.

events.title: Pilates & Barre
events.description: This class incorporates exercises from different workout styles—including barre, yoga, strength training, cardio, and dance—to give a modern twist to Mat Pilates. You can expect an effective full-body workout every class and to have fun while you're doing it.

events.title: Cardio Dance
events.description: Cardio Dance is a high energy and fun fitness/dance class that blends exciting club music and world rhythms with easy-to-follow choreography. Come and join the fun and find your rhythmic groove! No dance experience required. All levels welcome.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Pilates
events.description: Achieve a balanced and toned body with the ultimate core fitness workout! Incorporate Pilate’s postures with traditional core exercises to help improve posture, strength, and range of motion. Rejuvenate your workout with a focus on your breathing and find those deep core muscles in the abdomen and that surround the spine. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Pilates Reformer Circuit
events.description: Elevate your Pilates practice with our dynamic Pilates Circuit class! This energizing, full-body workout moves you through a series of stations using a variety of specialized equipment including the Reformer, Chair, Arc Barrel, Mat, and small props like Pilates rings and toning balls. Each station targets different muscle groups, blending strength, balance, flexibility, and core stability for a complete workout. The circuit format keeps things fresh and engaging, while the small group setting ensures personalized attention and proper form. Perfect for all levels, this class will leave you feeling strong, aligned, and revitalized! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility

events.title: Beginner Boxing
events.description: Learn how to pack a punch in this technical workshop designed to teach beginners the basics of boxing. This session provides instructions on boxing stance, footwork, and fundamental mechanics of the jab, cross, hook and uppercut. Join this fun session to stay in shape and build your confidence!- This is a non-contact class*- Hand wraps, gloves and non-slip shoes are highly reccomended!

During this hour, the SCC is adjusted to create a more comfortable and grounding atmosphere:Lights are dimmedSoft ambient music is playedOverall sensory input is minimizedWeights cannot be droppedThis space supports anyone who benefits from a quieter, gentler setting: whether due to sensory sensitivities, neurodiversity, anxiety, or simply a desire for a more peaceful workout experience.

events.title: Bootcamp
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity class that incorporates plyometric, strength, and interval training. Build your cardiovascular and muscular endurance using various types of exercise equipment and body weight exercises. Challenge yourself and get ready for a top to bottom workout, and finally relax and stretch! All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Salsa and Bachata
events.description: Learn the basics of Salsa and Bachata, the most popular Latin club dances. This group class puts the focus on social interaction, teaching you to lead, follow, and develop a sense of musicality for a smooth dancing experience. Please bring clean smooth-soled shoes for dancing; partners are not required.

events.title: Pilates & Barre
events.description: This class incorporates exercises from different workout styles—including barre, yoga, strength training, cardio, and dance—to give a modern twist to Mat Pilates. You can expect an effective full-body workout every class and to have fun while you're doing it.

events.title: Women's Only: Cardio HIIT
events.description: A 45-minute high intensity interval training class for all fitness levels. You will use a variety of cardiovascular and resistance training equipment such as Ski Ergs, Rowers, Curve Treadmills, weights and more to build cardiovascular and muscular endurance.

events.title: Women on Weights! (WOW)
events.description: A class that caters to women's needs and wants! Providing a safe space to get energized while building up strength and muscle. Push yourself and raise your limits with our women focused circuit training using a mix of cardio and weights. An inclusive, fun, and supportive environment that will teach you effective exercises and challenge you to reach your goals.

events.title: Meditation & Movement
events.description: Join us for a guided meditation paired with a physical practice to help us move our bodies into wellness including stretching, yoga, Pilates, and walking. Mindfulness is about being present and in the moment. No prior experience with mindfulness or meditation is required -- everyone is welcome, students, staff, and faculty! Modifications are offered for postures to ensure all levels are welcome.   If you have additional requests, please connect with our instructors.

featured.title: Pilates Reformer & Chair (Demo)
featured.description: This 3 week complimentary registered program is designed specifically for beginners as an introduction to Pilates including the Reformer and Pilates Chair in a supportive, small-group setting. This circuit-style class blends strength, cardio, balance, and flexibility with accessible modifications for all levels. Feel stronger, more aligned, and energized—no experience needed! This class offers modified exercises and supportive techniques to ensure comfort and accessibility. *This offering is limited to one registraion.

announcements.title: Service Disruption: Sunday, April 26, 2026 (6:30 AM - 10:30 AM)
announcements.body: Please note that Mississauga Road will be closed on **Sunday, April 26, 2026  from 6:30 AM to 10:30 AM** for the Mississauga Marathon. Delays are expected as roads open up post-race, please plan your visit to our facility/campus accordingly
